# Bedrock Cosmos

> A free, open-source custom proxy for Minecraft Bedrock Edition on Windows that adds custom capes, skin packs, hidden Marketplace highlights, and restored content.

Bedrock Cosmos is not affiliated with Mojang Studios or Microsoft. It is a community-built tool that operates as a lightweight client-side proxy — it does not modify game files or provide gameplay advantages.

## Key Features
- Custom capes library not available in vanilla Minecraft Bedrock Edition
- Custom skin packs beyond what's in the base game
- Marketplace Highlights: reveals hidden or region-locked Marketplace packs
- Restored Content: fixes official packs that have missing capes, animations, or skins due to updates
- Fully open source (MIT) — code available on GitHub
- Lightweight background process, negligible performance impact

## Platform Support
- Windows 10 and Windows 11
- Minecraft Bedrock Edition 1.21.120 and above
- Not compatible with Preview Edition or Education Edition
- Android support is unofficial/community only; official support is planned

## Pricing
Free to download and use. No subscription, no account required.

- Home: https://bedrock-cosmos.app/
- Download: https://github.com/Bedrock-Cosmos/Launcher/releases/latest

- Skin Packs: https://bedrock-cosmos.app/skinpacks/
- Changelogs: https://bedrock-cosmos.app/changelogs/
- Videos: https://bedrock-cosmos.app/videos/
- Articles & Guides: https://bedrock-cosmos.app/articles/
- Terms of Service: https://bedrock-cosmos.app/terms-of-service/
